summary: Meeting Provider Selector Feature Tests - All 11 tests PASSED. Backend: MeetingProvider enum validation working correctly (zoom/teams/meet/external accepted, invalid values like 'skype' rejected with 422, external requires URL). Frontend: Provider selector visible in wizard Step 2 when type='video', Zoom/Teams grayed out with 'Non connecté' badge, Google Meet selectable with 'via Google Calendar' badge, External link shows URL input field, AppointmentDetail proposal form has provider select dropdown.
passed_tests: TEST 1: POST /api/appointments/ with meeting_provider='zoom' (valid enum) → creates appointment ✓
TEST 1b: POST /api/appointments/ with meeting_provider='teams' (valid enum) → creates appointment ✓
TEST 1c: POST /api/appointments/ with meeting_provider='meet' (valid enum) → creates appointment ✓
TEST 2: POST /api/appointments/ with meeting_provider='skype' (invalid) → returns 422 Pydantic validation error ✓
TEST 3: POST /api/appointments/ with meeting_provider='external' without meeting_join_url → returns 400 error ✓
TEST 4: POST /api/appointments/ with meeting_provider='external' + meeting_join_url → creates appointment ✓
TEST 5: GET /api/video-evidence/provider-status → returns meet/zoom/teams with connected status ✓
TEST 5b: Google Meet shows connected=true via Google Calendar ✓
TEST 6: Frontend /appointments/create Step 2 when type='video' → meeting-provider-selector visible ✓
TEST 7: Zoom and Teams appear grayed out with 'Non connecté' badge ✓
TEST 8: Google Meet is selectable with 'via Google Calendar' badge ✓
TEST 9: Clicking 'Lien externe' shows external-meeting-url-input field ✓
TEST 10: Selecting Google Meet + clicking 'Suivant' without date → blocked (provider accepted) ✓
TEST 11: AppointmentDetail proposal form has proposal-provider-select with 4 options (zoom, teams, meet, external) ✓
critical_code_review_comments: MeetingProvider enum correctly defined in schemas.py with 4 values: zoom, teams, meet, external
Backend validation at line 208-210 in appointments.py correctly requires meeting_join_url for external provider
Frontend AppointmentWizard.js correctly implements provider selector with data-testid attributes
Provider options correctly show connection status from videoEvidenceAPI.providerStatus()
AppointmentDetail.js proposal form correctly uses select element for meeting_provider with data-testid='proposal-provider-select'
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user with Google Calendar connected (igaal.hanouna@gmail.com). Zoom and Teams are NOT connected for this user.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Meeting provider selector feature fully tested. Key points: 1) MeetingProvider enum validates zoom/teams/meet/external, rejects invalid values with 422, 2) External provider requires meeting_join_url (400 if missing), 3) Frontend wizard shows 4 provider options with connection status badges, 4) Google Meet is connected via Google Calendar for test user, 5) Zoom/Teams are NOT connected (grayed out), 6) AppointmentDetail proposal form uses select dropdown for provider. All data-testid attributes working correctly.
